scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p server/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p client/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p bots/tsconfig.json --noEmit
